methodsAttempted.query: QS 131-140 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search, targeted HTTP fetches, and official page/PDF extraction were used across QS131-140.

artifacts.summary: QS131-140 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for Macquarie, Erasmus Rotterdam, UNC Chapel Hill, Texas A&M, and TU Berlin. USM, UNAM, Bologna, TU/e, and King Saud were not expanded.

artifacts.title: QS131-140 AI Tools Extraction
artifacts.summary: Created source-backed tool records for QS rows 131-140, including Macquarie Copilot/DeepSeek treatment, EUR Erudite, UNC tools, Texas A&M AI Services, and TU Berlin ChatGPT Edu.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Records are tracker-derived summaries from public official sources and do not replace official university pages.
Schools without explicit tool-level official evidence were not expanded into named tool conclusions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Microsoft Copilot Chat is listed for Macquarie University (Sydney, Australia) in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: allowed. Derived endorsement type: institutionally licensed or procured.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"microsoft_copilot","rawToolName":"Microsoft Copilot Chat","description":"Macquarie staff are encouraged to use Microsoft Copilot Chat with their university account for AI work, and required to do so for work involving sensitive information.","howToObtain":"Log into Microsoft Copilot Chat with a Macquarie University account.","costToUser":"Not specified by the public source.","availability":"allowed","endorsementType":"institutionally_licensed_or_procured"}
